rationale: The implementation faithfully satisfies the frozen v13 Task 4a scope exactly as written. The inventory correctly commits the AM-40 spine packages and explicitly excludes the deferrals, alongside the D31/D32 normative tables with rigorous deep-freeze guarantees. Per D17/AM-17, only git and code weaver implementations are committed and evaluated via the D33 accepted-relative closure, with their entries strictly asserting equality to the derived closure sets. `util.mjs` properly shares one classifier/resolver (demonstrated in test-closure.mjs), includes the D21 and D26/D29 primitives strictly adhering to physical containment and accurate accounting, and wraps git safely. The `git` and `code` weavers exhibit the correct extraction mechanisms, deterministic outputs, and proper graph thread connections covering all required node shapes without any unauthorized runtime dependencies.
